page: Amazon Web Services r8idb.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance belonging to the r8idb server family. It is powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance features 128 virtual CPUs mapped to 64 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core, running on the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

The hardware configuration includes 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with 7600 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes, offering high-speed local data access. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads that also require high-speed local storage and substantial network throughput. The combination of 1024.0 GB of RAM, dedicated Intel processing, and 7600 GB of NVMe SSD storage makes it suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, real-time data processing, and enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idb.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at 3.9 GHz on the Nitro hypervisor. The hardware configuration delivers 128 vCPUs across 64 physical cores, 1024.0 GB of memory, and 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes. With a baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this instance is engineered for high-throughput, memory-intensive workloads. The qualitative cost efficiency of this instance is driven by its high resource density, combining massive memory capacity with high-speed local storage to eliminate external storage latency. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory data analytics, and enterprise-grade transactional workloads.
